pages.title: Cow
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Cow donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Provides Head, Torso, Arm, and Legs tokens. $(rev)Cow$(warn) pieces skew toward slow quadruped locomotion when legs carry the profile.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Saddle-capable torso:$(warn) shears strip saddles like vanilla livestock — consult Dominion chapter for riding notes.$(br2)$(aside)Torso implements saddling — ride your minion like livestock once saddled.$(br2)Harvest pieces like any donor mob; verify sewing compatibility in JEI before wasting organs.
